title: braya longii
intro: Braya longii, also known as Long's braya or Braya longii, is a rare and endangered species of flowering plant in the family Brassicaceae. This alpine plant has been found to possess medicinal properties, particularly in its ability to exhibit anti-inflammatory and antioxidant activities. The health benefits of Braya longii include its potential to reduce oxidative stress and inflammation, which can contribute to the prevention of various chronic diseases. Braya longii is often used in herbal preparations, such as teas and tinctures, which can be made by infusing the plant's leaves and flowers in hot water or a solvent like ethanol.
